stories.title: Refactor CLI argparse: replace positional project_dir with --analyze, add mutual exclusion
acceptanceCriteria: Positional project_dir argument removed from argparse
--analyze and --from-json are mutually exclusive (error + exit 1 if both used)
-o flag works with both --analyze and --from-json modes

stories.title: Update all existing tests to use new CLI interface
acceptanceCriteria: test_query_json.py updated: all subprocess CLI calls use --analyze instead of positional arg

stories.title: Update CLAUDE.md with new CLI usage examples
acceptanceCriteria: CLAUDE.md Commands section updated with --analyze syntax
